title: Ukraine’s Military Doesn’t Always Welcome Criticism. But That’s Her Job.
summary_full: Olha Reshetylova has been tasked by the government with overseeing soldiers’ rights. Some commanders resent her, but she says her work makes the armed forces stronger.
summary_public: Olha Reshetylova has been tasked by the government with overseeing soldiers’ rights. Some commanders resent her, but she says her work makes the armed forces stronger.
